listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Ribosome" in Cell Biology.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A structure that builds proteins from amino acids
wrongAnswers: A storage compartment inside a cell
A protein that speeds up a chemical reaction
A boundary that controls movement into and out of the cell

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Endoplasmic reticulum" in Cell Biology.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A membrane network involved in protein and lipid processing
wrongAnswers: A specialized structure inside a cell
A molecule used as a direct energy source in cells
The gel-like material inside a cell where many reactions occur

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Golgi apparatus" in Cell Biology.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An organelle that modifies and packages cell products
wrongAnswers: Movement of particles from higher concentration to lower concentration
